title: Introducing Dynamic Column Values for monday.com!
excerpt: Transform the way you manage column values and automate workflows with our latest addition to the monday marketplace: Dynamic Column Values! Designed to simplify and automate complex data tasks, this app leverages AI to …

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Transform the way you manage column values and automate workflows with our latest addition to the monday marketplace: Dynamic Column Values! Designed to simplify and automate complex data tasks, this app leverages AI to help you easily update and calculate column values without needing any technical expertise.

Dynamic Column Values offers nearly unlimited automation possibilities, surpassing the fixed capabilities of traditional formula-based solutions. Additionally, it is extremely user-friendly, allowing you to configure powerful automations using simple, human instructions, instead of complex formula syntax.

Key Features:

AI-Powered Automations: Easily set up automation rules to modify or set column values based on your specific needs—no coding required!

Nearly Limitless Automation Possibilities: Unlock a vast range of automation scenarios that go far beyond the traditional formula-based solutions, making complex tasks simpler and faster.

No Technical Expertise Required: Configure automations using natural, conversational language. Perfect for non-technical users who want powerful functionality without the complexity.

Fully Customizable: Adapt automation rules to suit your unique workflows, allowing for flexible and dynamic data transformations.

Use Cases:

Data Management: Automatically format text, calculate numbers and concatenate fields to maintain consistent and accurate data.

Project & Task Automation: Track progress, calculate deadlines and update statuses based on project milestones or due dates.

Financial Operations: Perform automatic monetary calculations, convert invoice amounts, format currency values and manage financial metrics with ease.

Inventory & Order Management: Track stock levels, manage expiry dates, calculate order fulfillment times, and generate alerts for low inventory automatically.

About us:

We are Deview Studios, a proud monday partner committed to enhancing your monday experience with innovative solutions!

How to Use:

Getting started with Dynamic Column Values is simple. Install the app from the monday marketplace and configure it in just a few easy steps. Once set up, create automation rules using natural language instructions, and let the app take care of the rest.

Dependencies:

Dynamic Column Values seamlessly integrates with your existing monday account, regardless of your subscription tier.
